reference: I think I may have accidentally pricked myself with a needle that I had just injected into a patient. I am not exactly sure if it did prick me, but I am a bit paranoid. This was also my first time giving an injection, so I was too scared to say anything to my instructor. Additionally, I was unable to see the patient's chart to understand what medical conditions he may have had. What is the best thing for me to do?
